text: cng petrol diesel is available every time but some of their staff are very rude and demand an extra 1 rupee for every transaction specially CNG staff (old man wearing maharashtrian white cap). This is his everything drama. He is also bais . The owners should take care of such staff to avoid unnecessary disputes arising in future. He is on duty now while posting this review. The owners are good by nature and understand customers issues. They should take care of there staff behavior with customers. Not all are same.

station_name: Chheda Service Station BPCL Petrol Pump
station_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, near Johnson Garden, Sambhaji Nagar, Mulund West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400082
text: Good thing is they have many filling machines but sometimes some of them don't work. Staff is rude sometimes. Staff says don't pay by UPI as they have to check whether the payment is received or not, but it's there duty to check it. PUC service of car and bike is also available here and also air pressure is available. Can't say about the quality of petrol.

station_name: Chheda Service Station BPCL Petrol Pump
station_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, near Johnson Garden, Sambhaji Nagar, Mulund West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400082
text:
Chheda Service Station (BPCL) is my go-to fuel station—reliable, efficient, and conveniently located near my residence. I’ve been refueling here for quite some time now, and I can confidently say that the quality of fuel and accuracy of measurement are truly superlative. They conduct regular checks, which assures me of both purity and quantity every single time.

One of the best aspects of this station is the almost zero wait time—especially for four-wheelers. Even for two-wheelers, the average wait is barely 5–7 minutes, and more often than not, you’re attended to immediately.

The service is quick and well-organized, with staff who are courteous and efficient. Plus, all modern payment options are accepted—cash, cards, UPI, and wallets—making the experience seamless.

Given the consistency and convenience, this is the only place I trust for refueling. Highly recommended for anyone in the vicinity looking for a trustworthy and hassle-free petrol pump.

station_name: Chheda Service Station BPCL Petrol Pump
station_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, near Johnson Garden, Sambhaji Nagar, Mulund West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400082
text:
I have been taking Petrol from BPCL's Chheda Petrol Pump for more than 20 years.
I have had good experience!
Their services are good & friendly!
I have never come across any problem in quantity/ measure and Quality of Petrol!
I am pretty happy & satisfied with their management & staff.
Best Wishes!
